timestamp: 02-07-2008
sender: user2.1@gvc.ceas-challenge.cc
subject: week 7
body: >Only 9 for me Girls on Film (but I can never distinguish between all those >80s pretty boys) and Tina TUrner. I recognized and could hum 3 and 4 but didnt get it right. Good Theme but I missed it. Again I only had one artist so couldn't find a link. I guess it was more Olyvia's music after all - she's happy that she finally managed to get a higher score than you :)  Here's a special birthday bonus edition: http://badtomatoes.org/tunetest/Birthday.mp3 I'll give you a call this evening after putting Sam to bed (I figure you're at school until 4 or 5). There ought to be a card in the mail when you get home. Cheers, Tony P.S. My birthday books arrived today - thanks again! No virus found in this incoming message. Checked by AVG Free Edition.
